title: Main Engine and Auxiliary Machinery Overhaul & Maintenance
paragraphs: We plan and execute dry-docking work with clear scopes, yard coordination, and class attendance. Hull steel, propulsion, and underwater fittings are surveyed and repaired to agreed standards and documentation packages.
Tell us your docking window and vessel particulars—we align resources and supervision so handover matches your sailing schedule.

title: Welding Services
paragraphs: Our marine services cover piping, systems, and auxiliary equipment in port and alongside. We work from approved procedures and keep traceability for parts, tests, and sign-off.
Whether the job is a short call or a multi-week availability, we structure the work list so owners see progress and risks early.

title: Blasting and Painting Services
paragraphs: We blast and paint the hull and superstructure of the vessel to agreed standards and documentation packages.
Ask us about our capacity and slots for your next project—we can advise on realistic timelines and interfaces with the yard.

title: Pipe Systems Maintenance
paragraphs: We fabricate and install piping and systems to agreed standards and documentation packages.
Ask us abougt our capacity and slots for your next project—we can advise on realistic timelines and interfaces with the yard.
